OFFERS.TITLE: Offers & Discounts
OFFERS.SUBTITLE: Track discounted products and update their offers quickly.

FILTERS.TITLE: Filters
FILTERS.SUBTITLE: Filter results through separate fields similar to super admin pages.

CREATE.COUPON_HINT: Create a new code, define the discount type, and set usage rules.
CREATE.CATEGORY_HINT: Launch a focused category campaign with a clear discount and duration.
CREATE.CLEARANCE_HINT: Pick a low-stock product and push it faster before it runs out.
CREATE.MODAL_HELP: New offers are saved directly inside the current vendor workspace.
CREATE.NOTE_AR_PLACEHOLDER: Explain the purpose of this coupon or campaign in Arabic.
CREATE.NOTE_EN_PLACEHOLDER: Explain the purpose of this coupon or campaign in English.
CREATE.CATEGORY_NOTE_AR_PLACEHOLDER: Write the operational or marketing note in Arabic.
CREATE.CATEGORY_NOTE_EN_PLACEHOLDER: Write the operational or marketing note in English.
CREATE.NO_LOW_STOCK_PRODUCTS: There are no eligible products for a last pieces offer right now.
CREATE.NO_LOW_STOCK_PRODUCTS_HINT: Lower stock levels or update quantities from the products page first.

OFFERS.DIRECT_OFFERS_HINT: Live offer prices currently applied to your products.
OFFERS.DIRECT_SECTION_HINT: Review products with active discounts and compare original versus final price.
OFFERS.ACTIVE_COUNT_HINT: Products currently carrying a real offer price.
OFFERS.COUPONS_COUNT_HINT: Discount codes ready for campaigns and traffic pushes.
OFFERS.AVG_DISCOUNT_HINT: Average discount percentage across listed offers.
OFFERS.CLEARANCE_OFFERS_HINT: Low-stock products that need a faster push.
OFFERS.TOTAL_SAVINGS_HINT: Total gap between both prices in {{currency}} per unit.
OFFERS.COUPONS_SUBTITLE: Discount codes for campaigns, ads, and order stimulation.
OFFERS.CATEGORY_SUBTITLE: Quick campaigns that activate a whole category instead of a single product.
OFFERS.CLEARANCE_SUBTITLE: Low-stock products that can move faster through a focused clearance offer.
OFFERS.EMPTY_DIRECT: No direct product offers match the current search.
OFFERS.EMPTY_COUPONS: No coupons match the current search.
OFFERS.EMPTY_CATEGORIES: No category campaigns match the current search.
OFFERS.EMPTY_CLEARANCE: No low-stock products match the current search.
OFFERS.EMPTY_DESC: Add a discount to any product from the products page or product details and it will appear here.
